title: Positive flow: Verify account with correct code
preconditions: User is logged in and on the account verification screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the account verification screen. | Enter the correct verification code into the input field. | Tap the 'Continue' button.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the next verification step or the account is verified successfully.

title: Negative flow: Verify account with incorrect code
preconditions: User is logged in and on the account verification screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the account verification screen. | Enter an incorrect verification code into the input field. | Tap the 'Continue' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the code is incorrect.

title: Boundary validation: Verify account with empty code
preconditions: User is logged in and on the account verification screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the account verification screen. | Enter an empty verification code into the input field. | Tap the 'Continue' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the code cannot be empty.

title: Toggle state: Verify account with valid code
preconditions: User is logged in and on the account verification screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the account verification screen. | Enter a valid verification code into the input field. | Tap the 'Continue' button. | Tap the 'Continue' button again after receiving a confirmation message.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the next verification step or the account is verified successfully.
